title: EN 1992-1-1:2004 Concrete Column Design
description: Design of reinforced concrete columns in accordance with EN 1992-1-1:2004.

member_label.description: Member Label. Reference name or ID for the column.

D.description: Depth (D). Units: mm. Depth of Section.

W.description: Width (W). Units: mm. Width of Section.

diameter.description: Diameter (D). Units: mm. Diameter of Section.

cover.description: Cover. Units: mm. Concrete cover measured to outside of transverse reinforcement.

size_bars.description: Bar Diameter. Symbol: Φ_long. Units: mm. Diameter of reinforcement bars.

n_bars_circle.description: Bars. Symbol: N_{bars}. Number of bars.

angle.description: Rotation. Symbol: \text{Angle}. Units: °. Angle to rotate the reinforcement pattern by. 0 degrees is defined to have a bar at the top of the center of the circle.

n_bars_z.description: Z-Bars. Symbol: N_{z}. Number of bars in each face in the z-direction.

n_bars_y.description: Y-Bars. Symbol: N_{y}. Number of bars in each face in the y-direction.

size_shear_bars.description: Bar Diameter. Symbol: Φ_{shear}. Units: mm. Diameter of shear reinforcement bars.

n_shear_bars_y.description: Y-Shear Legs. Symbol: N_{v,y}. Number of shear legs parallel to the y-axis (minimum 2 for external link).

n_shear_bars_z.description: Z-Shear Legs. Symbol: N_{v,z}. Number of shear legs parallel to the z-axis (minimum 2 for external link).

s.description: Ligature Spacing. Symbol: s. Units: mm. Ligature spacing down length of column.

l_u.description: lu. Symbol: l_u. Units: mm. Unsupported length of column.

k_y.description: kz. Symbol: k_z. Effective length factor for compression members about Z-Axis (buckling in Y direction) (5.8.1).

k_z.description: ky. Symbol: k_y. Effective length factor for compression members about Y-Axis (buckling in Z direction) (5.8.1).

concrete_strength.description: fck. Symbol: f_{ck}. Units: MPa. Concrete compression strength.

steel_yield_strength.description: fy. Symbol: f_y. Units: MPa. Yield strength of steel.

V_y.description: VEd,y. Symbol: V_{Ed,y}. Units: kN. Factored design shear load in y-direction.

V_z.description: VEd,z. Symbol: V_{Ed,z}. Units: kN. Factored design shear load in z-direction.

N.description: NEd. Symbol: N_{Ed}. Units: kN. Factored design axial load. (+ve for compression)

second_order.description: Moment Input Method. First Order: Provide moments from first-order analysis. This calculator will automatically generate second-order moments based on nominal curvature if the column is slender.Second Order: Provide design moments including second-order effects. This option is unavailable for short columns.

M_z.description: MEd,z. Symbol: M_{Ed,z}. Units: kN-m. Factored bending moment design load, including second-order effects as per 5.8.7 or 5.8.8, about z-axis.

M_y.description: MEd,y. Symbol: M_{Ed,y}. Units: kN-m. Factored bending moment design load, including second-order effects as per 5.8.7 or 5.8.8, about y-axis.

braced_or_unbraced.description: Braced. Structure is braced against sidesway (external systems provide sufficient restraint to lateral loads).

M_z_top.description: MEd,z,top. Symbol: M_{Ed,z,top}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the z-axis at the top of the column.

M_z_bot.description: MEd,z,bot. Symbol: M_{Ed,z,bot}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the z-axis at the bottom of the column.

M_y_top.description: MEd,y,top. Symbol: M_{Ed,y,top}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the y-axis at the top of the column.

M_y_bot.description: MEd,y,bot. Symbol: M_{Ed,y,bot}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the y-axis at the bottom of the column.

creep.description: Effective Creep Ratio. Select method for how to calculate effective creep ratio. Default is only available for short columns. This will set the value of A to 0.7 in Eq 5.13N.

user_creep_ratio.description: Φef. Symbol: Φ_{ef}. User defined value for effective creep ratio.

N_Eqp.description: NEqp. Symbol: N_{Eqp}. Units: kN. Quasi-permanent axial load applied to column, EN 1990:2002 (Eq 6.16a).

loading_age.description: Age At Loading. The age at which the column is subjected to loading (in days).

relative_humidity.description: Relative Humidity. Units: %. The relative humidity of the environment surrounding the column (Typically 50% and 70% for indoor and outdoor environments respectively).

cement_class.description: Cement Class. Cement class used for calculation of creep.

ambient_air_temp.description: Ambient Air Temperature. Units: °C. The average ambient air temperature surrounding the column over the period of prior to loading (Age At Loading).

apply_best_practice.description: Apply Best Practice. Apply best practices throughout calculation. Please see documentation for full clarification on where and how best practice values are applied.

show_table.description: Show Reinforcement Table. Show table in concrete section image.

report_detail.description: Report Detail. Level of detail in the report. Simplified - Hide explicit tension and compression checks and only show interaction diagram in resultant direction.Normal: Show tension and compression explicit and interaction for uniaxial direction and biaxial.Detailed: shows the force in concrete and steel for key points in interaction diagram.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
